dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6134 IH: Student Transparency for Understanding Decisions in Education Net Terms Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Feenstra (for himself, Mrs. Hinson, and Mr. Nunn of Iowa) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To require disclosure of the total amount of interest that would be paid over the life of a loan for certain Federal student loans.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Student Transparency for Understanding Decisions in Education Net Terms Act or the STUDENT Act.
Section 455(p) of the Higher Education Act of 1965 (20 U.S.C. 1087e(p)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking shall, with respect to loans and inserting the following: “shall—
by striking part B. and inserting part B; and; and
by adding at the end the following:

include in the disclosure required under section 433(a) the total amount of interest that would be paid over the life of the loan, using the standard repayment plan applicable based on the total outstanding principal of all loans of the borrower.
